
  // Type_type
  public class Type_type {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var generic_type : Generic_type?
    var p_name : Type_string = e_string
    var p_extends : Type_string = e_string
  }
  // Type_type_generic
  public class Type_type_generic : Vx_Core.Type_generic {
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_type_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_type
    }
  }
  // Generic_type
  public class Generic_type {
    // p_shutdown
    public func p_shutdown() {}
    // p_any_from_any
    public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return f_empty(type_type)
    }
    // p_call
    public func p_call(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return self.p_new(type_type, anylist)
    }
    // p_empty
    public func p_empty(
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return e_any
    }
    // p_copy
    public func p_copy(
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return v_empty_from_any(type_any)
    }
    // p_new
    public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return f_empty(type_type)
    }
  }
  // Generic_type_type
  public class Generic_type_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_type = v_type_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_type = v_type_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_type = v_type_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_type = f_type(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_type_constructor
  public static func v_type_constructor(
  ) -> Type_type {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_type()
  }
  // v_type_create
  public static func v_type_create(
  ) -> Type_type {
    var output : Type_type = v_type_constructor()
    v_type_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_type_register
  public static func v_type_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_type_startup_type()
    v_type_startup_empty()
    return t_type
  }
  // v_type_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_type_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_type
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_type_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = Vx_Core.e_type
    }
  }
  // v_type_startup - mutating
  public static func v_type_startup(
    _ value : Type_type
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_type_any = Generic_type_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_type,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_type_startup_empty
  public static func v_type_startup_empty() {
    v_type_startup(e_type)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_type,
      e_type.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_type_startup_type
  public static func v_type_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_type
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/type")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.e_string
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_type_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_type
  public static func v_any_from_type(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_type
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_type_from_any
  public static func v_type_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.e_type
    if let type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type = type_any.type_type {
      output = type_type
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_typename_from_any
  public static func v_typename_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_string {
    let type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_from_any(type_any)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_typename_from_type(type_type)
    return output
  }
  // v_typename_from_type
  public static func v_typename_from_type(
    _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_string {
    return type_type.p_name
  }
  // v_typenamen_from_any
  public static func v_typenamen_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> String {
    let type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_from_any(type_any)
    let output : String = Vx_Core.v_typenamen_from_type(type_type)
    return output
  }
  // v_typenamen_from_type
  public static func v_typenamen_from_type(
    _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type
  ) -> String {
    let type_string : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_typename_from_type(type_type)
    let output : String = Vx_Core.v_stringn_from_string(type_string)
    return output
  }
  // v_empty
  public static func v_empty(
    _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = v_generic_type_from_type(type_type)
    return generic_type.p_empty()
  }
  // v_type_copy
  public static func v_type_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_type,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    return copyval
  }
  // f_type
  public static func f_type(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_type = v_type_copy(e_type, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_type : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_type : Type_type = v_type_constructor()
